name: App Icon Forge
description: Native macOS icon processor that turns one source image into app icon packages or simple Gear catalog icons.

capabilities.title: Generate macOS app icons
capabilities.description: Generate a rounded, inset macOS app icon package from one local image path, including AppIcon.icns, AppIcon.iconset, AppIcon.appiconset, and a 1024px preview.
examples: Generate a macOS icon package from this image path
Create AppIcon.icns with rounded corners and safe inset

source_path.description: Local image path selected or supplied by the user.

output_dir.description: Optional output directory. Defaults to App Icon Forge gear data.

name.description: Output base name. Defaults to AppIcon.

content_scale.description: Visual scale of the rounded icon inside the transparent canvas.

corner_radius_ratio.description: Corner radius as a ratio of the inset icon rect.

shadow.description: Whether to add a subtle macOS-style drop shadow.

codex.skill_hint: Use only when the current user explicitly asks Codex to generate macOS app icons from a local image path. Pass only local source_path/output_dir values supplied by the user or returned by Gee capabilities, and report the returned icns_path/iconset_path/appiconset_path/preview_path exactly as Gee returns them.

capabilities.title: Generate Gear list icons
capabilities.description: Generate a Gee Gear list icon package from one local image path, including a 780x580 assets/icon.png tile, preview-780x580.png, and a gear-icon.json spec file.
examples: Generate a Gear list icon from this image path
Create assets/icon.png for a Gear manifest

source_path.description: Local image path selected or supplied by the user.

output_dir.description: Optional output directory. Defaults to App Icon Forge gear data.

name.description: Output folder base name. Defaults to GearIcon.

content_scale.description: Visual scale of the rounded icon inside the transparent canvas.

corner_radius_ratio.description: Corner radius as a ratio of the inset icon rect.

shadow.description: Whether to add a subtle macOS-style drop shadow.

codex.skill_hint: Use only when the current user explicitly asks Codex to generate Gee Gear catalog icons from a local image path. Pass only local source_path/output_dir values supplied by the user or returned by Gee capabilities, and report the returned icon_path, manifest_icon, preview_path, and metadata_path exactly as Gee returns them.
